---
title: "About"
---

### About the Author

Hello, Thank you for visiting KayVerse. I’m **Htet Kay Khaing**.

I am currently **Postgraduate Student from Master of IT in Business (Data Science and Analytics) at Singapore Management University**. This portfolio reflects my progress in applying visual analytics methods to explore data, communicate insights clearly, and design more effective visualisations.


### Connect with Me

- **Email:** [htetkaykhaing@gmail.com](htetkaykhaing@gmail.com)
- **LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/in/htetkay-khaing/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/htetkay-khaing/)
- **GitHub:** [https://github.com/htetkaykhaing](https://github.com/htetkaykhaing)
